entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 27
entries.excerpt: Of David himself, before he was anointed. Christ's young soldier speaks, on his coming to the faith. The Lord is my light, and my salvation: whom shall I fear? Psalm 26:1. The Lord will give me both knowledge of Himself, and salvation: who shall take me from Him? The Lord is the Protector of my life: of whom shall I be afraid? The Lord will repel all the assaults and snares of mine enemy: of no man shall I be afraid. Whilst the guilty approach unto me to eat up my flesh Psalm 26:2. Whilst the guilty come near to recognise and insult me, that they may exalt themselves above me in my change for…
